meta_title: Reefer Container Rental & Leasing in Karnataka | Crystal Group
meta_description: Rent or lease reefer containers across Karnataka — Bengaluru, Mysuru, Mangaluru and more. From ₹1,300/day. 24/7 temperature monitoring. FSSAI-compliant. Get a free quote.
hero_disclaimer: *Prices indicative. Final quote based on container size, duration and delivery location. GST at 18% applicable on all rentals.
form_heading: Get a Free Quote — We Call Back in 2 Hours
form_disclaimer: We'll call you within 2 business hours. No spam, ever.
usp_heading: Why Crystal Group for Reefer Containers?
usp_points: Pan-Karnataka fleet — containers available across 9+ cities with same-week delivery.
-25°C to +15°C operating range — suitable for pharma, dairy, seafood, horticulture and frozen foods.
24/7 remote monitoring — real-time temperature tracking with SMS/email alerts on every unit.
Flexible terms — rent for a single day or lease for 12 months. No lock-in penalties, no hidden fees.
FSSAI-compliant containers, professionally maintained and sanitised between every assignment.
3,000+ successful cold chain assignments completed across South India since 2007.
testimonials_heading: Trusted by Industry Leaders Across Karnataka
testimonials_subheading: Businesses across Karnataka rely on Crystal Group for reliable, compliant cold chain logistics.

testimonials.text: Crystal Group's reefer containers have been a game-changer for our inter-city milk distribution. Temperature consistency is excellent and the team is always responsive. We've been with them for over two years now.
We needed last-minute cold chain capacity for a clinical trial consignment. Crystal Group arranged two 20 ft reefers within 48 hours. Impeccable service and full documentation provided.

Reliable, hygienic, and competitively priced. Our seafood quality during transit improved significantly since we moved to Crystal Group containers. Their monitoring system gives us real-time confidence.
We lease three 40 ft reefers on a monthly basis for our Bengaluru distribution hub. The remote monitoring feature gives us complete peace of mind and our audit trails are always clean.
